title: Norwegian Pineapple Stir Fry
description: A comforting Norwegian inspired dish with a tangy twist, featuring pineapple and a stir fry method.
instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the cubed rye bread and cook until toasted, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove the bread from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter to the skillet.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the pineapple chunks and stir-fry sauce to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Return the toasted rye bread to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
